name: agentos
description: A faster, lighter, cheaper alternative to sandboxes. Run any coding agent inside an isolated Linux VM, with agent orchestration built in.
summaryZh: A faster, lighter, cheaper alternative to sandboxes. Run any coding agent inside an isolated Linux VM, with agent orchestration built in. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
